caption: A person works on a green all-terrain vehicle (ATV) in a garage or workshop. Initially, the view focuses on the green plastic body panels of the vehicle, showing various contours and gaps where parts are attached. The scene then shifts to the internal mechanical components of the ATV's drive system. A person's hand enters the frame, pointing toward a large, silver metal pulley or clutch assembly and the associated drive belt. The hand gestures toward the side of the pulley, highlighting the area where the belt wraps around the mechanism. The background reveals other workshop elements, including a tire with a deep tread pattern resting on the floor. Throughout the sequence, the focus moves from the external casing of the ATV to the inner mechanical workings, specifically concentrating on the belt-driven system.
